channel.title: Anas Semesmieh Blog
channel.description: Platform engineering, Azure architecture, DevSecOps, and engineering leadership insights.

item.title: Self-Hosting Vaultwarden: Ditching 1Password for Total Password Ownership
item.description: How I replaced 1Password with a self-hosted Vaultwarden instance — zero subscription cost, full data ownership, nightly NAS backups, and seamless Bitwarden apps across every device.

item.title: Single Sign-On for Homelabs: Authentik, Traefik Forward-Auth, and Cloudflare Tunnel
item.description: How I eliminated password fatigue across 15+ self-hosted apps with Authentik SSO, Traefik forward-auth middleware, MFA, and external access via Cloudflare Tunnel.

item.title: Secrets Management for Homelabs: Redaction, Scanning, and Rehydration
item.description: A complete secrets lifecycle with automated redaction, leak scanning, rehydration workflows, and rotation practices.

item.title: Homelab Disaster Recovery in Under an Hour
item.description: How I rebuild my entire homelab from a clean Ubuntu install using a Git-backed config repo, compose-based restore, and secret rehydration.

item.title: Platform Engineering Works When Innovation Ships With Guardrails
item.description: Why platform teams create the most value when they turn experimentation into secure, compliant, and self-service operating paths.

item.title: Driving AI Adoption in Platform Teams Without Losing Engineering Discipline
item.description: A practical framework for adopting AI in platform engineering with guardrails, measurable outcomes, and team-wide enablement.

item.title: Automated Config Backup with Secret Redaction
item.description: How I built a daily backup pipeline that syncs configs, redacts secrets, scans for leaks, and pushes sanitized snapshots to GitHub.

item.title: Docker Compose All The Things: Running 10+ Services on One Host
item.description: Running Traefik, Pi-hole, Plex, Arr stack, Immich, Home Assistant on a single Ubuntu host with Docker Compose.

item.title: Leading Through Uncertainty Without Performing False Confidence
item.description: Leadership lessons on navigating uncertainty with transparency, team ownership, and enough protection to keep focus intact.

item.title: My Home Lab Journey: Start Here
item.description: Introduction to my Docker-based homelab running Traefik, Pi-hole, Plex, Arr stack, Immich, Home Assistant with automated backups and disaster recovery.

item.title: Designing an Internal Developer Portal That Teams Actually Use
item.description: A practical playbook for rolling out an internal developer portal, increasing adoption, and enabling safe self-service engineering workflows.

item.title: AI Is an Amplifier, Not a Substitute for Engineering Judgment
item.description: Practical lessons on using AI to remove repetitive work, raise team capability, and keep engineering judgment at the center.

item.title: From Legacy to Immutable: A Practical IaC Maturity Journey
item.description: A practical approach to driving Infrastructure as Code maturity and moving toward immutable infrastructure across legacy and modern environments.

item.title: How Platform Engineering Creates Strategic Capacity
item.description: Reducing KTLO effort, enabling IDP self-service, and leveraging automation and AI-assisted workflows.

item.title: SaaS for Wholesale in Automotive: What Good Digital Transformation Looks Like
item.description: A practical framework for evaluating SaaS in automotive wholesale, from process fit and integrations to security and rollout.
